tracks.meaning: to establish or maintain contact with someone, typically by conversation or correspondence
to participate or become involved in an activity or process
to attract and hold the attention or interest of a customer or audience
to capture or occupy someone's thoughts or emotions in a meaningful way
to interlock or mesh with something, as gears or mechanical parts do
to enter into a contract or agreement, typically by pledge or promise
to lock or mesh together mechanically, as in the engagement of gears
to pledge oneself to marry another person, typically marked by an exchange of rings
